## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One paragraph max. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New wizard step or option
- [ ] New instrument / soundfont support
- [ ] Audio engine improvement
- [ ] MIDI / WAV export
- [ ] Lyrics analysis
- [ ] GUI / UX
- [ ] Docs / repo hygiene

## Checklist

- [ ] `python main.py` launches without errors
- [ ] Audio plays on the affected step(s)
- [ ] No LLM calls introduced at runtime
- [ ] No network calls at runtime (air-gap rule)
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes (if tests exist)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if this changes public behavior
- [ ] One logical change per PR — no layer-split commits
